ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder (Counsel for Michele Daly).

Mr. Feder appeared to advise the Court of a possible settlement of the matter and on the basis of that representation, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
